title: Xtra Sweet Argentinian Sage Toast
description: A sweet and savory Argentinian dish featuring sage and toast, perfect for a vegan-friendly brunch
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit
In a small saucepan, combine the maple syrup, lemon juice, and olive oil, and bring to a boil over medium heat
Reduce the heat to low and simmer the syrup mixture for 5 minutes, or until it reaches a glassy jelly consistency
Meanwhile, toast the bread slices until they are lightly browned
Brush the toasted bread slices with the syrup mixture
Top each bread slice with a few sage leaves and a sprinkle of salt
If using pomegranate seeds, sprinkle them over the top of each bread slice
Serve the toast warm, garnished with additional sage leaves if desired
